scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build && (pip install -r backend/requirements.txt || pip3 install -r backend/requirements.txt || python3 -m pip install -r backend/requirements.txt || true)
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter @workspace/kinetra --filter @workspace/api-server --if-present run typecheck
